name: clean-code
description: Analyze source code against Robert C. Martin's Clean Code principles: Meaningful Names, Functions, Comments, Formatting, Objects & Data Structures, Error Handling, Boundaries, Unit Tests (F.I.R.S.T.), and Concurrency, plus the Chapter 17 Smells & Heuristics catalog. Reports structured, actionable findings rated HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW, each with a code location, the violated heuristic ID from the book, and a concrete refactoring step.
